subcodes.first_line: O Thou Almighty Lord! Strengthen all mankind that they may do according to the instructions and teachings recorded in these writings
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار نوع بشر را موفق نما که بوصایا و نصایح مندرجه در این مکاتیب عمل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for peace and unity, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love and unity, @universal peace; world unity, @wisdom [hikmat], @oneness; unity of religion
